questions.question_text: An intercity shuttle travels between two cities, Amanfro and Kotoku, covering the first half of the distance at an average speed of $60 	ext{ km/h}$ and the second half at $90 	ext{ km/h}$. The total distance between the two cities is $300 	ext{ km}$.

sub_questions.question_text: Calculate, for the entire journey, the average speed of the shuttle.
If the speed of the shuttle in the first half of the journey is reduced to $50 	ext{ km/h}$, determine its effect on the overall time.

questions.question_text: A stock broker, Kojo, invested some amount in two accounts which pay $11 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$ and $10 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$ simple interest annually. The amount invested at $11 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$ is $140 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$ of the amount invested at $10 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$. After $3 rac{1}{2}$ years, he earned a total of GH₵ $22,580.60$ as interest. How much was invested at $11 	ext{ 	ext{%}}$?

A contractor builds a rainwater collection system in a shape of a hemispherical tank of radius $2 	ext{ m}$ to irrigate a $500 	ext{ m}^2$ farm. Each square metre of the farm requires $50$ litres of water. Determine, with a mathematical statement, if a full tank of water would be sufficient to irrigate the farm? [Take $π =  rac{22}{7}$]

From the top of a lighthouse $100 	ext{ m}$ high, the angles of depression of two fishing vessels are observed at $48^{	ext{°}}$ and $36^{	ext{°}}$. The foot of the lighthouse and the sea level are on the same horizontal and the two vessels are on the same side of the lighthouse.

sub_questions.question_text: Illustrate the information in a diagram.
Find, correct to the nearest metre, the distance between the two vessels.

questions.question_text: The midpoint of the line joining Y $(2a, 3)$ and Z $(-4, b)$ is M $(1, 2a - 1)$. Find:
